author: Xbox YouTube
text:
EMPULSE Early Access Launch Trailer
EMPULSE has launched in Early Access. EMPULSE is a fast-paced 6v6 movement shooter. Wall-run, grapple, Holojump, pilot mechs, and P.A.I.N.T. your way through Freehold's vertical streets. Outmove your opponent or get outgunned.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/empulse-game-preview/9n6nvs6zpg8j

The legend began here.

Step into the fight once again and claim the title of Tekken, The King of Iron Fist Tournament!

Arcade Archives 2 TEKKEN is now available on XBOX Series X|S!

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Diablo IV | Season of Death Awakening | Gameplay Trailer
Sooner or later, Death comes for us all.

💥 New Pandemonium Ruptures
⚰️ New Deathtoll Chamber
✨ Reworked Mythic Uniques
🤝 Diablo IV x Overwatch Collab
😈 Warlock in the Free Trial

Diablo IV: Season of Death Awakening begins June 30th.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 - Welcome to West City Trailer
Step into West City in AGE 1000 and gear up for your next big adventure.

Watch the latest DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3 footage and prepare for the ultimate battle experience.

#DBXV3 launches on XBOX Series X|S in 2027.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/dragon-ball-xenoverse-3/9N30KLM8JP2S/0010

Dive into the newest look at DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 3, packed with fresh story details and the first-ever gameplay reveals.

As you step into life as both a Great Saiya Squad and a West City University student, a new era of battles and choices unfolds.

Stay tuned for more updates.
